text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 47 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_ERNDS_IND 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Running Errands Alone — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is 15 years old or older and has difficulty doing errands 
alone such as visiting a doctor’s office or shopping because of a physical, mental, or emotional 
condition; ever in the calendar year.
